id.description: Unique identifier for the EDM artifact. Required for provenance, linking, auditing, and .ddna envelope binding

version.description: Declares which EDM schema this artifact conforms to and enables safe validation and migration

created_at.description: Marks when the artifact was extracted. Anchors temporal provenance

source_timestamp.description: The timestamp of the original source content, distinct from created_at which marks extraction time

updated_at.description: Optional timestamp for post-extraction updates. Never replaces created_at

locale.description: Linguistic and cultural context of the source content

owner_user_id.description: The artifact owner identifier. VitaPass enables cross-vendor identity resolution; vendor-specific IDs limit portability. MUST be null in stateless mode
owner_user_id.x_constraints: VitaPass (recommended), UUID, or free-text; null for stateless

parent_id.description: Links this artifact to its parent in multi-step extractions or threaded sequences

visibility.description: Determines who may view or process the artifact

pii_tier.description: Classification of personal or sensitive content. Controls retention, masking, and export rules

source_type.description: The medium from which the artifact was extracted

source_context.description: Optional narrative describing the input scenario

consent_basis.description: Legal basis for storing and processing emotional data

consent_revoked_at.description: If populated, the artifact becomes non-retrievable and non-exportable, except minimal audit form

tags.description: Optional user-defined labels for organizing or filtering artifacts

profile.description: Implementation profile declaration. Canonical profile (essential/extended/full) or partner profile ID with 'partner:' prefix per EDM v0.8.0 Section 3.7.2 and ADR-0017. Determines minimum required fields.
profile.x_constraints: essential, extended, full, or partner:<id> per ADR-0017. Required for v0.8.0 conformance
